summary: Great show with a barn‑burner second set kicked off by Shakedown Street, though recording details are unclear.
review: The reviewer describes the concert as an amazing Saturday afternoon performance, highlighting a scorching second set that opened with Shakedown Street. No specific comments about the audio source or sound quality are provided, so the recording quality remains unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: A single enthusiastic 4‑star review praises the musical performance strongly but gives no information on recording quality, leading to a solid show rating tempered by uncertainty about the audio.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments about sound clarity, mix, or source were provided in the review.
